info.description: One size and color with price and how many you have left

item_code.description: Your own short code to recognise this item, e.g. Grey-Hoodie-M

color_dot.description: Optional — color on the website (# code, e.g. #1E3A5F)

photo.description: Picture for this size and color (optional — uses product picture if empty)

color_photos.description: More photos for this color — detail shots and alternate angles

price_for_bulk.description: How much per piece when buying many (leave empty if no bulk price)

min_quantity_for_bulk.description: How many pieces the customer must buy to get the bulk price

how_many_left.description: How many of this size/color you currently have
